Combine Gut and Science to Build Your Midmarket Sales Team
abstract: So many of us have worked to build our sales teams by using our internal guesses as to who the new sales reps are to be hired, and who the sales manager will be. It turns out that is an inaccurate plan and super costly. Most of us cannot ”guess” better than 50% accurately. Therefore, the wrong hires are costing our companies six figures or even seven figures each time in actual costs, missed selling opportunities, onboarding, ramp-up, morale, and more.  There is another way, using data and science to support our good guesses and build an incredible mid-market revenue team.

title: Why Agents Won't Survive Your Fragmented Stack
abstract: AI agents promise to revolutionize marketing, but fragmented tool stacks are setting them up to fail. EJ Cho, CEO of Tofu, reveals why shallow context leads to hallucinated output and how unified platforms create the data architecture that makes AI agents actually work. Learn why integrated platforms will dominate the AI agent era and how to position your business for success in this new landscape.

title: CoLab 3: Redefining Your Role in the Age of AI
abstract: Your current job is disappearing. Sorry, but it's true. AI is changing how we work forever. This workshop helps Sales/Marketing/Service pros stop panicking and start pivoting—learn what makes you irreplaceable and learn how to design your new role. This session is a repeat offering (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

title: Unlocking Data Magic for Sales and Marketing
abstract: Unlock revenue potential with AI-powered HubSpot tools that manage your customer data without the headache. Discover how marketing leaders maintain pristine CRM data that drives increased campaign performance. Learn how sales teams can building simple automations that save hours each week and catch opportunities your team is currently missing —all while their teams focus on driving revenue instead of fixing spreadsheets.

title: Interactive Workflow Automation: You Vote, We Build—LIVE!
abstract: Unlock the full potential of HubSpot with this INTERACTIVE WORKING SESSION! Brought to you by the hosts of HubSpot Hacks YouTube Channel with 28k+ subscribers, you can vote on which workflows they build next! With step-by-step guidance, you’ll leave this session empowered to set up these automations yourself. Perfect for HubSpot users who’ve dabbled in workflows but want to level up. Whether you're looking to sharpen your skills, avoid common pitfalls, or explore new ways to leverage automation in HubSpot—this interactive session is for you!

title: Lab: Making Customer Success Impact Undeniable
abstract:
Customer success leaders may feel like the unsung heroes of their companies, so how can you get recognized as champions of retention? This hands-on lab teaches you to connect your customer success efforts to measurable business outcomes. You'll understand key success predictors like customer feedback and health scores, as well as managing revenue in the customer success workspace. 

This Lab is ideal for customer success leaders with a Service Hub Professional or Enterprise account.

title: New Content Playbook: AI and Creative Strategies That Work
abstract: Marketing is shifting fast—rising paid media costs, declining SEO, and the rise of AI are reshaping how content is created and discovered. But with change comes opportunity. Learn how to adapt your content strategy to thrive in this new landscape. HubSpot’s VP of Media shares proven AI, creative, and optimization tactics for building scalable content, partnering with creators, and driving sustainable growth. Leave with actionable tips on channels, content engines, and measuring success at any scale.

title: Tools for Growth: Turning Data Into Decisions With AI
abstract: Answer complex marketing questions and uncover actionable insights in minutes, not weeks. This session demonstrates how Snowflake Cortex AI enables you to connect your HubSpot data with qualitative feedback such as call notes and surveys to find the "why" behind key marketing metrics.

title: AI Email That Converts—Without Sounding Like a Robot
abstract: AI-generated emails can sound robotic and convert poorly—but they don’t have to. Learn the frameworks behind HubSpot’s 2x conversion rate gains using AI in email across the customer journey. You’ll discover when AI amplifies your results (and when it amplifies your mistakes), plus how to personalize at scale without losing your voice.

title: Meetup: Improving Customer Experience in Manufacturing
abstract:
Join fellow manufacturing professionals for real talk about connecting production teams with customer-facing staff. Share what works, hear fresh ideas, and meet others who are figuring out how to close deals faster while keeping specs accurate. This is your chance to build connections with industry peers in a relaxed setting.
Come as you are, bring your questions, and leave with new connections who understand the manufacturing world. 

*Session reservations required this year.

title: Meetup: Revenue Leaders Mastering Subscription Growth
abstract:
Join us for a 45-minute industry meetup with fellow revenue folks who understand what you're navigating. Drop the corporate speak and get real about growing your business. No PowerPoints or pitches—just authentic conversations with people who get your challenges. Share wins, laugh about failures, and make meaningful connections. Whether tackling pricing, customer success, or growth targets, you'll find your people here. Bring your questions and growth hacks that work. 

*Session reservations required this year.

title: Spark Studio Session 2
abstract: Head towards the Impact Theater just passed The Spot and Fathom, and you'll find Spark Studio. Every great brand starts with a spark — and in Spark Studio, you'll bring one to life. Over 45 minutes, you and your team become a founding crew launching a brand from scratch. You'll dream big, craft winning pitches, navigate surprise challenges, and pivot under pressure before reflecting on the journey. This is a fully immersive, high-energy simulation where you won't just watch, you'll do. Expect fast-paced collaboration, creative problem-solving, and shared momentum that comes from building together under the clock. Seats limited, reserve now. What will you pitch?

title: The TwoEleven Matrix™: Solving the Marketing Memory Problem
abstract: Transform your marketing from forgettable noise to memorable experiences that drive engagement and growth. This interactive 90-minute session introduces the TwoEleven Matrix™—a revolutionary framework that helps marketing professionals create content designed for what and how audiences remember, not just what they hear in the moment. You'll discover why traditional messaging approaches fail to stick and learn a six-component system that works with human psychology to build lasting brand connections that influence future purchasing decisions.

title: Revenue Modeling 101: Plan, Predict and Scale for 2026
abstract: You'll build a revenue model that actually works—one that aligns marketing and sales with company goals so you can plan your next moves with confidence. You’ll walk away with a revenue model template you can use immediately, whether you’re refining your go-to-market strategy or just trying to make sense of the numbers. No fluff, no guesswork—just a proven framework to help you hit (and exceed) your revenue goals.

title: Meetup: RevOps Data-Driven Success in the AI Era
abstract:
Join fellow RevOps professionals, marketing ops specialists, sales ops leaders, and data analysts for in-person networking and strategic conversation about the data challenges shaping our industry.

As AI transforms how we drive revenue, the quality and accessibility of our data has never been more critical. But let's be honest - most of us are still wrestling with siloed systems, inconsistent data quality, and the endless manual work that keeps us from focusing on strategic impact! Let's come together and talk about how we can change that!

title: ENCORE: New Content Playbook: AI and Creative Strategies That Work
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Marketing is shifting fast—rising paid media costs, declining SEO, and the rise of AI are reshaping how content is created and discovered. But with change comes opportunity. Learn how to adapt your content strategy to thrive in this new landscape. HubSpot’s VP of Media shares proven AI, creative, and optimization tactics for building scalable content, partnering with creators, and driving sustainable growth. Leave with actionable tips on channels, content engines, and measuring success at any scale.

title: How to Win at AEO With Zero Budget
abstract: Discover how to dominate AI search without breaking the bank. Get hands-on experience using tools & agents to enhance traditional SEO processes. Learn about cutting-edge AEO tactics that you can implement today. And, understand when we can & can't measure AI search optimizations. Built for teams ready to take action today. Live Q&A throughout.

title: Content That Scales Your Impact, Not Your Output
abstract: As attention spans shrink and content noise grows, enterprise teams face a new creative mandate: move faster, stay consistent, and stand out visually. In this panel, marketing leaders from high-performing organizations share how they’ve operationalized visual communication at scale. You’ll learn how they balance speed, structure, and storytelling to capture attention, build trust, and drive measurable growth across channels and teams.

title: Inside Data Hub: Democratizing Data in the AI Era
abstract: Discover how HubSpot's reimagined Data Hub democratizes data management in the AI era. Learn how to break down data silos, enhance data quality, and power advanced AI-driven use cases across Sales, Marketing and Service Hubs. Get a walkthrough of key new features and get a preview of what's coming next!

title: Beating Burnout: Use Personal Growth to Drive SuccessAl
abstract: Break free from burnout-driven content creation. Learn sustainable creative leadership through intentional personal development. Build a "sovereign practice" where fulfillment and profit align. Master energy-based systems, regenerative routines, and authentic presence for lasting success.

title: Rethinking Lead Gen: Your Blueprint for AI Growth
abstract: In today's AI powered world, how can your business truly connect, stand out, and drive more high quality leads? This keynote delivers a clear blueprint to lead this exciting new era. Discover how your own data strategy, when thoughtfully applied to Google AI, can become your key to building real differentiation and incremental growth.

title: Vibe Eventing: Data-Driven Event Monetization
abstract: What if you could bottle your best event's energy—and sell it? Explore the next frontier: using data to decode audience attention, amplify engagement, and unlock revenue. Go beyond traditional metrics to learn how "vibe eventing" powers new sponsorship models and premium experiences. Perfect for marketers ready to lead where attention equals profit.

title: From Campaign Chaos to Canvas Magic: Meet Marketing Studio
abstract: Tired of juggling tools and watching campaigns stretch from weeks into months? Join us for a first look at Marketing Studio—HubSpot's AI-powered workspace that transforms campaign planning and execution. We'll demo how it turns briefs into complete strategies in minutes, enables real-time team collaboration on an infinite visual canvas, and launches multi-channel campaigns in under 14 days. For the first time, plan, build, and launch from a single tool. Perfect for Marketing Hub Pro+ users ready to eliminate campaign chaos.

title: Tools for Growth: No Missed Calls With 24/7 AI Voice Agents
abstract:
JustCall AI Voice Agent is the inbound call automation layer modern revenue teams are missing — replacing manual qualification, clunky IVRs, and missed leads with an always-on, CRM-integrated AI agent. 
In this demo, we show how you can turn more inbound calls into revenue opportunities.

title: AI Creator Studio: Scale Video Content With Smart Tools
abstract: Master AI-powered video strategy in today's saturated market. Learn to leverage AI for ideation, production, and distribution while preserving your authentic voice. Navigate YouTube's dominance and cross-platform video demands with practical frameworks and measurement systems.

title: AI as the Great Equalizer: Small Teams vs. Industry Giants
abstract: Discover how MOBI is punching well above its weight against competitors with 10x the resources through strategic AI implementation. Chief AI Officer Scott Fox will share their dual-pronged approach: using AI to multiply internal team capabilities while simultaneously providing AI-powered solutions to businesses that often lag in tech adoption.

title: Tools for Growth: Choose an AI Outbound Agent That Works
abstract: Most AI SDR tools promise pipeline—few deliver it. In this Tech Stack Showcase, you’ll learn a 3-part framework to evaluate AI outbound agents based on real-world campaign use cases, messaging quality, and usability across your GTM team. We’ll show you how top revenue teams are scaling personalized outbound—without scaling headcount.

title: Teardown Live! Sales Navigator InMail
abstract: InMail messages sent on Sales Navigator have some of the lowest response rates for sales and marketing teams. In this session, world-leading LinkedIn & Sales Navigator expert Daniel Disney will do a LIVE teardown, sharing real InMail messages sent and helping turn them into radically improved templates that will actually work to drive more replies, leads, and sales.

title: Everboarding: The Modern Approach to Onboarding
abstract: Stop thinking of onboarding as a one-time event and start thinking about it as a continuous journey. We’ll explore how to create a dynamic, ongoing learning experience that empowers your customers to fully utilize your product or service to achieve their desired outcomes.  We will challenge traditional onboarding approaches and introduce strategies for building lasting relationships and driving customer lifetime value.  We’ll cover key elements of everboarding, including tailored content delivery, ongoing support resources, and regular check-ins.

title: Time Kills Deals. AI CPQ Is Here.
abstract: Why can you buy a $60K Tesla in 5 minutes, but it takes weeks to buy $60K of software or service? Join Commerce Hub GM Sarika Garg to discover how top sales leaders are closing deals fast and improving cash flow. Learn actionable strategies to transform your revenue operations for your team and customers.

title: Unlock Profit With Privacy: Marketing Strategies That Work
abstract: The future of marketing is privacy-first and performance-driven. In this tactical, no-fluff session, learn how to turn consent into a growth engine—not a blocker. Get grounded in the evolving privacy landscape, then dive into strategies backed by real case studies. We’ll cover Consent Mode implementation, boosting opt-in rates, using Customer Match effectively, and building privacy-forward flows that convert. If you’re ready to turn compliance into ROI, this is your session.

title: Inside Breeze: The Bold Truth About Being an AI Leader
abstract: There's a lot of noise about AI right now, but what if there was a clear path forward? Join Nicholas Holland, SVP of AI at HubSpot, as he cuts through the chaos and reveals HubSpot's bold vision for becoming an AI leader. Discover how every employee gets an AI chief of staff, teams gain leverage through agents and assistants, and AI is seamlessly embedded into your daily workflows. Whether you're just starting or trying it all, learn the proven playbook that transforms any business into an AI leader.

title: Beyond Acquisition: Turning Users Into Lifelong Customers
abstract: Acquiring customers is only half of the battle — driving early product stickiness is where compounding growth happens.  Discover how to blend quantitative and qualitative data to design experiences that stick: define your value proposition, identify your ”aha moment,” and design an onboarding experience that turns new users into successful customers.  We’ll walk through a real life case study on how Pexels rebuilt their creator (customer) onboarding to grow their community to 300K+ and unlock 3M+ pieces of content. From high-level strategy, to practical tips you can implement immediately.

title: How To Get  Users To Adopt Your New AI Features
abstract: Everyone’s rushing to build AI products, but in our study of 767 software users, labeling features as ”AI-powered” lowered performance expectations and didn’t boost willingness to pay. The AI product graveyard is filling up fast. This session reveals the science behind successful AI product adoption, showing how concepts like effort-reward balance and status quo bias determine whether users will adopt your AI features. You’ll learn why small changes in product architecture can drive big adoption differences, backed by real A/B test results, specific UI examples, and actionable frameworks.

title: CoLab 2: Stop Fighting Resistance—Start Using It
abstract: You're not lazy. You're adaptively reluctant, and that's your superpower. This group experience flips productivity advice by revealing why resistance to tasks is an evolutionary feature. Learn the FORCE framework that works WITH your reluctance, not against it, and why the AI age demands weaponizing your resistance. Ideal for leaders looking to unlock productivity for themselves and their teams. This session is a repeat offering (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

title: AI-Powered Email: From Idea to Inbox in Minutes
abstract: Are you spending hours on manual email creation, coding personalization, and guessing at what works? HubSpot’s AI-Powered Email automates the heavy lifting, turning hours of manual work into minutes. In this demo, we'll generate a complete, on-brand email from a simple prompt and convert any design into an editable template in under a minute. You'll see how to deliver true 1:1 personalization at scale—no coding required. We’ll even show you how AI predicts optimal audiences and provides instant performance insights. It's time to trade manual execution for strategy.

title: The Agentic Marketing Funnel: Agentic Marketing Is Here
abstract: AI agents are here and the advantage for marketing leaders is clear—CMOs are back in the driver's seat when it comes to pipeline generation, and thanks to autonomous marketing, it's never been easier. Learn how teams like Greenhouse Software, NextGen Healthcare, and Demandbase are automating their pipeline generation and steal their strategies for seamlessly implementing AI sales agents.

title: Lab: Unifying Your Tech Stack With HubSpot
abstract: Integrating your tech stack with HubSpot gives you a unified view of your business—but it starts with asking the right questions. In this lab, you’ll meet fictional company Fern Baby Fern, whose messy stack needs help. You’ll learn a repeatable process for auditing tools and, with a partner, recommend what to integrate, migrate, or rebuild in HubSpot. Leave with an audit template, a proven process, and integration resources you can apply to your own business.

title: Data Storytelling: Customer Insights for Content Strategy
abstract: This conversation teaches creators to leverage customer data for better content. Learn to analyze behavior patterns, translate insights into compelling themes, and create testing frameworks. Move beyond guesswork to build data-driven strategies that actually connect with your audience.

title: Fuel Pipeline and Close Deals in the Anti-Social Buyer Era
abstract: Join Rex Galbraith, CRO, and Betty Mok, SVP Marketing, at Consensus, as they unveil the secrets to thriving in an era where traditional sales tactics fall flat. Today’s buyers are “anti-social”—they don’t want the old-school sales pitches and drawn-out processes that most organizations are still clinging to.

title: What’s New for Sellers With HubSpot
abstract: The sales game is changing, and staying ahead means working smarter than ever. Join us to learn how HubSpot’s newest AI-powered sales tools give you the competitive edge to prospect faster, sell smarter, and handle the busywork so you can focus on what matters most: closing more deals.

title: Tools for Growth: Redefining Modern Prospecting
abstract: Your go-to-market motion should run like a high-performance machine—fast, precise, and scalable. Stop relying on outdated lead-based tactics that stall growth. Join this live tech showcase to see how Demandbase and HubSpot use AI to identify buying groups, enrich data, and activate smarter prospecting campaigns.

title: AI-Powered Growth: Move Fast Without Losing Control
abstract: Learn how to harness AI for growth while staying in control of your data. HubSpot’s Chief Legal Officer Erika Fisher and EVP of Product Karen Ng share clear principles, practical guidance, and key tradeoffs to help business leaders move fast, confidently, and responsibly.

title: CoLab 1: The Scale Delusion: Is Personal Touch Dead?
abstract: For years, Customer Success, Community, and Customer Support relied on personal touch. But with budgets decreasing and expectations increasing, scale is the word on everyone's lips. How do connection-focused industries thrive in a world focused on digitalization? Join fellow leaders for deep discussion on where customer-focused roles are heading in the age of AI. From existential to tactical, we'll explore shifting trends and leave you with tactics, philosophies, and a reminder that you're not alone. This session is a repeat offering (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

title: The AI Growth Stack: VC Insights on the New GTM Playbook
abstract: Leading venture capitalists will explore how artificial intelligence is fundamentally rewriting the go-to-market playbook. Panelists will share insights on the AI-powered sales and marketing tools they're investing in today, which traditional GTM approaches are becoming obsolete, and how founders should be thinking about building AI-native strategies from day one. Hear firsthand how investors are evaluating startups with AI-driven sales efficiency and what metrics matter most in this new landscape.

title: How Top CMOs Are Using AI To Build B2B Creativity and Impact
abstract: AI is making brand and emotional connection more critical than ever in B2B marketing, not less. Three leading CMOs will share how they’re navigating the balance between AI automation and brand authenticity while establishing marketing as a strategic driver of AI adoption across their organizations. They’ll share real examples of what’s working and what’s not, how to use AI to deepen customer relationships and strengthen brand trust, and tips on showing marketing’s strategic value to the C-suite.

title: Lab: AI Prompting for Marketing Excellence
abstract: Ready to move beyond basic AI requests? In this hands-on lab, you'll write, test, and refine prompts that deliver marketing gold instead of generic fluff. Through interactive exercises using both HubSpot's AI tools and external platforms, you'll learn about and practice iterative prompting methods to refine outputs until they're publication-ready, ensuring your work is always slick, never slop. Bring your laptop and real marketing challenges—leave with the skills and techniques to consistently create AI prompts that think like your best marketing strategist rather than just a content machine.

title: You To The Power of AI
abstract: In a special solo keynote, HubSpot Co-founder and CTO Dharmesh Shah explores how to build and lead in an era of unprecedented change. From AI transformation to evolving customer expectations, Dharmesh will decode the patterns that define tomorrow's successful companies. Walk away with a clearer vision of what's coming and the practical steps to position your business ahead of the curve.

title: Unifying Your Tech Stack: HubSpot's Marketplace Reimagined
abstract: New to HubSpot or hitting a plateau? Explore the redesigned Marketplace with unified search for new apps & AI tools like Breeze Agents. Discover a personalized storefront with smarter search and learn how AI within the Marketplace helps solve for jobs to be done, bridge gaps, unifies data, and more. Open to all audiences.

title: Answer Any Customer Question With Data Agent
abstract: Manual research slows your team down. Data Agent does the work for you—analyzing CRM data, conversations, documents, and the web to deliver clear answers to custom business questions. Just complete customer intelligence where you need it: in your Smart CRM, workflows, and data studio. See how Data Agent helps marketing, sales, and service teams move faster, personalize every interaction, and make smarter decisions with confidence.

title: Drive Predictable Revenue With a Process-First Approach
abstract: Tired of feeling like HubSpot isn't working for you or spending countless hours looking for answers that aren't there? It's time for a revolution! Ditch the data dump and transform HubSpot into a real-time insights engine. Learn to slice & dice your lead and deal pipelines, master metrics like velocity & lead vs. deal load, to truly unlock the full buyer journey. Witness real-world HubSpot customer success stories and arm yourself with actionable strategies to supercharge forecasting & revenue attainment. A well-configured HubSpot aligned with a clear process, is your ticket to explosive growth.

title: Meetup: Community Champions and HUG Leaders
abstract:
Connect with fellow HubSpot enthusiasts at our HubSpot Community Champions & User Group Leader meetup. Open to all members of the Community Champions program & HUG Leaders, this time will be dedicated to networking, real time problem solving, making in person connections, and the chance to grab some exclusive swag. 

*Session reservations required this year.

title: Maximize AI-Driven Campaign Impact With Asana and HubSpot
abstract: Tired of disconnected tools, launch delays, and campaign bottlenecks that take a toll on marketing ROI? Discover how AI-powered campaign workflows bring speed, clarity, and accountability - from intake through execution and reporting. See a live demo in Asana featuring how the latest AI capabilities, powerful automations, and the integration with HubSpot come together to transform your next campaign. You'll also gain proven insights from Asana's Work Innovation Lab to help teams launch high-impact campaigns that grow customers and revenue.

title: AI-Powered ABM: Revolutionize Your Marketing Strategy
abstract: In today’s digital age, B2B marketers have more tools than ever, yet they still face the challenge of cutting through the noise and delivering highly personalized, impactful campaigns. Discover how AI-driven insights, personalization, and automation can enhance targeting, improve customer engagement, and optimize campaigns for better results. Learn practical strategies to leverage AI tools effectively, drive higher ROI, and stay ahead in an increasingly competitive landscape. Gain actionable strategies for leveraging AI and transform your ABM programs for greater impact and measurable results.

title: 30 Charts That Will Change the Way You Do Marketing
abstract: What if you could see exactly what works in marketing, backed by millions of data points? Neil Patel reveals the patterns behind high-performing content, social engagement, and conversion strategies, based on an extensive analysis of 150,000 blog posts, 3 million social media updates, and feedback from 10,000 marketers. These 25 key insights cut through the noise and spotlight where real results come from. Whether you're refining strategy or reallocating budget, you'll walk away with a data-backed playbook for smarter, more effective marketing.

title: Meetup: The Neurodivergent Edge in the Age of AI
abstract:
This session isn't about teaching neurodivergent people to fit in-it's about unlocking their unique strengths in an AI-driven world. Join HubSpot's Chris Riley and SJ Morris for a candid conversation on the power of neurodiversity in tech, common myths, and practical strategies for building more inclusive workplaces. Identify key cognitive advantages, and how neurodivergent thinking fuels innovation. A follow-up to last year's "Neurospicy" meetup, with more hosts to come. 
*Session reservations required this year.

title: Spark Studio Session 1
abstract: Head towards the Impact Theater just passed The Spot and Fathom, and you'll find Spark Studio. Every great brand starts with a spark — and in Spark Studio, you'll bring one to life. Over 45 minutes, you and your team become a founding crew launching a brand from scratch. You'll dream big, craft winning pitches, navigate surprise challenges, and pivot under pressure before reflecting on the journey. This is a fully immersive, high-energy simulation where you won't just watch, you'll do. Expect fast-paced collaboration, creative problem-solving, and shared momentum that comes from building together under the clock. Seats limited, reserve now. What will you pitch?

title: The Physics of GTM: The Three Laws of Go-to-Market Success
abstract: Historically, many GTM tools were low-floor, low-ceiling products built for junior reps—and the only way to grow revenue was to grow headcount. AI breaks this model, helping small teams quickly launch & experiment with plays at scale. CROs and GTM leaders: learn where the industry is headed and how to find a competitive edge with unique data, plays, & GTM Engineering.

title: Customer Education: The Missing Link in Your Lifecycle
abstract: Customer education is more than onboarding; it’s a growth engine. In this session, learn how leading marketing, revenue, and customer experience teams use education to attract ideal customers, accelerate value, and drive loyalty. You’ll leave with practical ways to turn learning into a powerful tool across every stage of the prospect and customer journey.

title: Meetup: Startups and Sangria: Founders Speed Networking
abstract:
Grab a sangria (or NA option) and connect with fellow founders in this high-energy networking meetup. Share insights, swap stories, and build meaningful connections with peers and potential mentors across industries. It’s a chance to supercharge your journey, spark new ideas, and meet other HubSpot-using founders on the path to growth. Who knows what opportunities you’ll uncover?

*Session reservations required this year.

title: The Creative's Guide to AI: Thriving in the Age of Agents
abstract: Where does human creativity belong in an AI-powered world? Find out in this session drawn from the work of scaling Agent.ai through rapid growth with a very small team. Learn how to apply a flexible framework for how and when to use agents throughout your creative process, and feel free to focus your creative energy where it will do the most good.

title: The Agent.ai Workshop: From Idea to Agent
abstract: Join Mike Redbord—HubSpot alum and Head of Ops at Agent.ai—for a high-energy, hands-on workshop that demystifies agentic AI. Go from curious to confident as you: get a jargon-free breakdown of key AI concepts, see a live Agent.ai demo, build your own AI agent in small groups, and share your creation at a “science fair” showcase. Whether you're AI-curious or ready to lead change, you’ll leave with real skills—and a working AI agent—to solve real problems. Come build with us at INBOUND.

title: Tools for Growth: Fix Contract Chaos With Automation
abstract: Clunky contract processes drain sales productivity. Discover how dynamic data and automation streamline creation, approvals, and e-Signatures — cutting delays and friction. Eliminate bottlenecks and unlock faster deal cycles with smarter workflows.

title: The AI Concierge: Transforming Your Front Office With Customer Agent
abstract: See how HubSpot’s Customer Agent can become your AI-powered front office concierge—engaging, qualifying, and nurturing prospects while delivering exceptional support to your existing customers. Learn how you can automate lead qualification, CRM updates, and seamless sales handoffs, freeing up your team to focus on what matters most. Discover how multiple agents work together to build an agentic flywheel, turning website traffic into pipeline and happy customers, all without increasing headcount. Join us for a practical demo and real-world strategies to unlock the future of AI-driven customer engagement for your business.

title: Teardown Live! Does Their Story Suck – Or Convert?!
abstract: The MOST unique and useful brand-focused session ever! Get ready for the rapid critique of attendee-submitted brand messaging, backed by the proven brand methodology rooted in buyer psychology, that will fuel powerful brand messaging tactics for your organization. The good, bad, and ugly…there is no holding back with the candid feedback on whether these organization’s efforts are hitting the mark in creating brand conversations that convert. Hear proven brand positioning methods that work, pitfalls to avoid, and experience a session unlike any other!

title: The Science of Visibility: Storytelling That Builds Trust
abstract: Your brand isn’t just competing for attention—it’s competing for belief. In an oversaturated market, trust is the key to breaking through. This session unpacks the science of storytelling using the Elaboration Likelihood Model (ELM) to craft narratives that engage both logic and emotion. Learn how to create high-impact brand stories that resonate, persuade, and build lasting loyalty. Through real-world examples and interactive exercises, you’ll leave with actionable storytelling strategies that drive visibility, trust, and conversions.

title: 5 Tactical Ways To Grow Organically on LinkedIn
abstract: Struggling to break through on LinkedIn? Join Daniel Murray and Mark Jung, who earned 321.21M organic impressions in 2024 with their 5 Attention Tactics. Learn the exact strategies that drove 898,648 new followers and 5.13M engagements – no paid ads required. Whether you’re building your personal brand or scaling your company page, discover how to become a Top 1% LinkedIn authority (the same approach that scaled three B2B media companies to 7 figures).

title: Meetup: Networking for The Spot Community
abstract:
Join our interactive meetup for Black and Latine attendees within The Spot Community! Network and share stories in a vibrant atmosphere complemented by delicious food and beverages. Build meaningful connections, and explore opportunities for collaboration in a lively and inclusive setting.

*Session reservations required this year.

title: Breeze Agents: Your New Digital Teammates
abstract: Discover how to expand your team's impact without growing headcount. In this session, meet Breeze's AI workforce, specialized agents that solve daily challenges with speed and precision. Explore Breeze Studio to easily find, install, and customize 20+ marketplace agents to your business with no coding needed. See live demos of agents working 24/7, automating workflows, and driving real business outcomes. Learn how these digital teammates reduce busywork and let your team focus on what matters most.

title: Inside Marketing Hub: Reclaiming Purpose in Marketing
abstract: Join Angela DeFranco, GM of Marketing Products at HubSpot, for an inside look at the latest AI-powered marketing features designed to help you drive measurable results in today’s fast-moving landscape. In a world increasingly shaped by automation, Angela will also explore what makes marketers irreplaceably human, and how to combine cutting-edge tools with the creativity, strategy, and empathy that only humans can bring.

title: The Leadership Gap Is Costing You—Here’s How to Fix It
abstract: The leadership gap is a business risk that directly impacts growth, innovation, and revenue. Companies with diverse leadership teams are 70% more likely to capture new markets and 35% more likely to outperform competitors. Yet, many organizations unknowingly stall their own progress by failing to fix the “broken rung” in leadership pipelines. This session breaks down the impact of homogenous leadership and provides a data-driven, actionable roadmap to build stronger, more inclusive teams that drive long-term success.

title: Tools for Growth: Turn Video Views Into Action With Wistia
abstract: Learn how Wistia’s HubSpot integration helps turn video and webinar engagement into action. From beautifully branded webinars to embedded videos, we’ll show you how to capture leads, automate follow-ups, and track performance—without adding tools or complexity. If you're looking to scale your content strategy and prove ROI, this session is for you.

title: LinkedIn Ads Deep Dive: Get Big Discounts on Your Traffic
abstract: The B2B targeting of LinkedIn Ads is incredible, but advertisers are paying more than they need to, reducing the results they can get for their budget.  Join AJ Wilcox, the host of the LinkedIn Ads Show, as he walks you through the 5 changes that you can make to your LinkedIn Ads campaigns to cut costs in half, right now, and double your pipeline.

title: Lab: HubSpot Workflow Automation With AI
abstract: In this lab, you'll learn how to develop intelligent workflows to automate customer engagement based on behavioral triggers. This lab is ideal for those seeking to streamline marketing, sales, and service processes through AI-enhanced automation. You'll discover how customer actions can initiate personalized and efficient automated responses, resulting in improved customer experiences and greater productivity.

title: CoLab 4: Max Your ELUs: Events That Lead With Energy
abstract: For experienced event leaders ready to rethink ROI. Event success isn't measured in headcount—it's measured in ELUs (Energy Leadership Units). Join event marketing expert Dahlia El Gazzar exploring how to create events where Eyes Light Up. Through peer dialogue and energy mapping, discover where your events create energy spikes vs. leaks. Collaborate with senior event professionals to build tactical energy boosters you can implement immediately. This session is a repeat offering (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

abstract: Head towards the Impact Theater just passed The Spot and Fathom, and you'll find Spark Studio. Every great brand starts with a spark — and in Spark Studio, you'll bring one to life. title: Activating Your Customer Data With the Data Studio
abstract:
Learn how the new data studio in Data Hub makes it easy and fast for anyone to combine customer data from across their tech stack, enhance it with AI, and then activate it across the HubSpot Platform.
Data studio breaks down data siloes, eliminates hours of manual data work, and helps you drive revenue by unlocking customer insights that were previously inaccessible to marketing, sales and service teams.
Join us for a demo that shows how the data studio works, and how unified datasets can be used in segments, workflows, reports and more!

title: Meetup: Out at INBOUND
abstract:
Join the LGBTQIA+ Meetup at INBOUND, hosted by the LGBTQIA+ HubSpot User Group! Connect with LGBTQIA+ professionals and allies in a fun, inclusive space for real conversations and meaningful connections. Enjoy interactive activities, small-group chats, and icebreakers—not your typical networking event. Whether you're new or returning, come as you are and help us build a more inclusive HubSpot community, one conversation at a time.

*Session reservations required this year.

title: Lab: HubSpot Email Marketing Toolkit for the AI Era
abstract: Discover how to leverage HubSpot's comprehensive email marketing tools to create campaigns that truly connect with your audience. In this interactive Lab, you'll learn how AI can help craft compelling copy, practical ways to improve deliverability, and smart approaches to measuring what works. You'll leave with actionable strategies to immediately enhance your email performance and measure its impact on your marketing goals.

title: Unifying Customer Relationships With AI, Data, and CRM
abstract: Data and AI continue to change the customer experience. In this session, we’ll embark on a transformative journey into intelligent data and learn what will set the most successful companies apart in the future. Don’t miss this opportunity to unlock the secrets of leveraging data with AI, to achieve extraordinary outcomes in your CRM. You'll leave ready to stay ahead of the ever-changing world of intelligent data.

title: How to Show Up in ChatGPT: HubSpot’s Winning AEO Playbook
abstract: Your prospects are asking AI for answers before they visit your website. Is your content showing up? HubSpot cracked the code on LLM optimization with 200+ pages built for AI citation. In this tactical session, learn how we measure success through share of voice in AI responses. Get a proven framework for structuring content for LLMs, examples of high-performing AI pages, and the right metrics for ROI when AI answers your customer’s questions.

title: Spark Studio Session 10
abstract: Head towards the Impact Theater just passed The Spot and Fathom, and you'll find Spark Studio. Every great brand starts with a spark — and in Spark Studio, you'll bring one to life. Over 45 minutes, you and your team become a founding crew launching a brand from scratch. You'll dream big, craft winning pitches, navigate surprise challenges, and pivot under pressure before reflecting on the journey. This is a fully immersive, high-energy simulation where you won't just watch, you'll do. Expect fast-paced collaboration, creative problem-solving, and shared momentum that comes from building together under the clock. Seats limited, reserve now. What will you pitch?

title: From Lead to Loyalty: Is B2B Too Obsessed With the Funnel?
abstract:
The traditional B2B funnel is broken. We've become so obsessed with moving leads through stages that we've forgotten to design genuine customer experiences. What if the future of B2B marketing isn't about optimizing funnels—but about building relationships that transcend the first sale?
Hear from marketing leaders as they challenge conventional wisdom about B2B customer journeys. From rethinking the role of virtual events in relationship building to expanding marketing's ownership beyond the handoff, this session tackles the hard questions every growth-focused leader is asking.

title: HubSpot Admin Essentials: Core Features Every Admin Should Master
abstract: Master the foundational elements every successful HubSpot implementation needs. From proper architecture setup to essential workflows and reporting frameworks, learn the critical features that prevent costly mistakes and set your organization up for long-term success regardless of your experience level.

title: ENCORE: What’s New for Sellers With HubSpot
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! The sales game is changing, and staying ahead means working smarter than ever. Join us to learn how HubSpot’s newest AI-powered sales tools give you the competitive edge to prospect faster, sell smarter, and handle the busywork so you can focus on what matters most: closing more deals.

title: Tech at the Edge: Strategies and Insights With MKBHD
abstract: Join tech authority Marques Brownlee (MKBHD) for an essential conversation on navigating technology's rapidly evolving landscape. Discover how to evaluate emerging tech trends and build authentic audience connections in a digital-first world. Marques shares his journey from content creator to industry influencer, revealing practical frameworks for staying ahead without chasing every trend. You'll leave with actionable insights on which technologies deserve your attention, how to maintain brand integrity across platforms, and insights into what's next.

title: Teardown Live! Data Pitfalls, Fixes, and Hidden Gems
abstract: In this no-holds-barred session, we'll perform live teardowns of attendee-submitted data challenges, revealing hidden opportunities and dangerous pitfalls. You'll witness real-time critiques backed by analytics and leave with actionable strategies to immediately improve list health, engagement, and conversions. Perfect for anyone who needs efficient solutions to complex data problems and wants to drive measurable results without wasting resources on ineffective tactics. Bring your challenges—we'll transform them into growth opportunities. 🚨

title: Winning With Relevance: AI-Powered Segmentation and Personalization
abstract: Your audience expects relevance—without it, even the best campaigns fall flat. HubSpot’s new Segments (previously Lists) and Personalization features help you achieve relevance with ease. With AI-driven segment discovery, web visitor insights, and one-click activation across various marketing channels, you can finally connect with the right people, in the right way, at the right moment. Add in an AI-powered personalization agent that generate tailored experiences, and you’ll see how HubSpot helps marketers win with relevance.

title: Scaling With AI: Growth Lessons From Early Founders
abstract: 90% of startups report positive outcomes from AI in their go-to-market strategy. Join successful founders discussing how they use AI to accelerate growth. Learn practical strategies for implementing AI across operations that deliver immediate value without massive resources. Discover tools and trends helping smaller teams scale efficiently.

title: Lab: Building a Proactive Customer Support Strategy
abstract:
Transform your support strategy from constantly putting out fires to preventing them entirely. In this hands-on Service Hub lab, you'll explore how AI-powered tools can automate routine tasks, discover proven methods for building effective self-service resources, and learn smart approaches to measuring customer satisfaction. 

*This session is for folks with a Service Hub Professional or Enterprise account.

title: How AI Will Change Video
abstract: Video has transformed communication, but we're entering its next evolution. Synthesia CEO Victor Riparbelli explores how AI will reshape video as profoundly as social media reshaped content consumption. Over the next decade, AI won't just make video faster and cheaper—it will make it fundamentally different through hyper-tailored videos that adapt to each viewer and experiences that respond in real time, blurring lines between watching and participating. Following the keynote, Financial Times' Cristina Criddle joins for a fireside chat on opportunities, challenges, and ethics of storytelling.

title: Inside Smart CRM: How Unified Data Unlocks Growth
abstract: Join this session for an insightful panel discussion led by product leadership to explore how unified customer data is transforming business operations and customer experiences. This product-focused session will showcase how Smart CRM's innovative approach to data unification solves the fundamental challenges that have plagued traditional solutions for years.

title: No More Lost in Translation: An Automated Sales to Customer Success Handoff
abstract: Tired of watching sales and customer success play the blame game around poor customer handoffs? Come learn how HubSpot can automate these handoffs sharing all the context a CSM needs int he customer success workspace. No more copy-pasting notes, missed details, or clunky transitions—just a seamless flow of insights that sets customers up for success. Join us for a demo that shows how automated context sharing helps your teams deliver a smoother, more professional customer experience.

title: CoLab 5: Redefining Your Role in the Age of AI
abstract: Your current job is disappearing. Sorry, but it's true. AI is changing how we work forever. This workshop helps Sales/Marketing/Service pros stop panicking and start pivoting—learn what makes you irreplaceable and learn how to design your new role. This session is a repeat offering of CoLab 3 (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

title: 5X Your Revenue: Uniting Marketing and Customer Success
abstract: Customer success as a strategic motion (not just a department) can 5x your revenue—it’s true! In this session, discover how Marketing can harness a customer success framework to move beyond lead generation and drive revenue at every stage, from engagement and onboarding to upselling and renewals. Learn how to turn fragmented customer journeys into a seamless revenue engine using a playbook that combines AI and data for personalization and cross-functional collaboration to achieve sustainable, long-term growth.

title: Tools for Growth: Capture, Qualify, and Convert With NetLine
abstract:
If your lead gen strategy is designed to wait for the perfect moment, you’ve already lost.

In this Tech Stack session, NetLine CRO Bill Henry shows HubSpot marketers how to transform buyer engagement into qualified pipeline using NetLine Lead Gen, powered by real-time intent, precision filtering, and fully automated delivery. Ideal for demand gen, RevOps, and marketing ops pros.

title: Lab: From Data Chaos to Clarity With HubSpot Smart CRM
abstract: Fragmented customer data holds your business back — marketing can’t segment, sales misses signals, and service lacks context. In this hands-on workshop, learn how to turn HubSpot Smart CRM into a unified data powerhouse. We’ll walk through step-by-step tactics to build a strategic data framework, maintain data quality, and unlock insights your teams can use. You’ll leave with a starter guide and a clear roadmap to make HubSpot Smart CRM your single source of truth.

title: HubSpot Spotlight
abstract: Join HubSpot CEO Yamini Rangan and EVP of Product Karen Ng on the Main Stage to open INBOUND as they unpack the latest trends in AI, marketing, sales and service, and announce innovations from across the HubSpot platform.

title: How to Get Your Business Venture Capital Ready
abstract: Join leading venture capitalists in this engaging panel for founders. Gain actionable insights into securing capital, streamlining the investment process, and identifying key opportunities. This session emphasizes investing in Black, Latine, and minority-founded SMBs, providing scaling founders with strategic approaches to thrive in the competitive VC landscape.

title: HubSpot for Marketing. Different CRM. 1 Seamless GTM Motion.
abstract: Struggling to connect HubSpot with a different CRM? This session unpacks the most common GTM breakdowns between systems and shows how to build fast, seamless handoffs for the full buyer journey. Perfect for RevOps, Marketing Ops, and Sales Ops leaders navigating cross-platform chaos.

title: The Secret to SuperHuman-Centric Marketing That Converts
abstract: Most marketing today? Robotic, disconnected, forgettable. You’re checking all the boxes—SEO, content, metrics—but where are the conversions, loyalty, and real human connection?  Here’s the truth: Humans don’t buy from brands. They buy from other Humans. Without authenticity, empathy, and purpose, you’re leaving relationships and revenue on the table. In this no-BS, high-energy session, I’m unveiling the SuperHuman Marketing Framework—a blueprint for marketing that feels good, builds trust, and converts like crazy.

title: Sound Bites: Bite-Sized Takes on the Future of AI in GTM
abstract: Senior revenue leaders from Vidyard, LinkedIn, and Gong share their unfiltered takes on agentic AI, how sales and marketing roles are changing, what teams are doing to achieve personalization at scale, and the top skills GTM pros need to be learning now. Come for the conversation, stay for the snacks, and leave with easily applicable insights.

title: Meetup: Cold Calling for Modern Revenue Teams
abstract: Is cold calling dead—or just evolving? Join this birds-of-a-feather meetup for a candid chat with GTM leaders rethinking the role of live conversations in an AI-powered world. Learn how teams use real-time signals to prospect smarter, align sales and marketing, and boost pipeline from the phone. Expect peer benchmarks, tips, and lessons from tighter workflows and better targeting. This is a meetup, not a monologue—come ready to share, swap stories, and leave with fresh ideas (and maybe a few new friends).

title: Smart Insights: From CRM Data To Real Intelligence
abstract: Smart Insights makes it easy and fast to turn your CRM data into clear next steps. Instead of spending hours reviewing call notes, emails, and reports, Smart Insights surfaces what matters most—like key interactions, engagement gaps, and pipeline shifts—with a single click. These AI-powered insights help sales, marketing, and service teams move faster, balance workloads, and spot opportunities before they’re missed. Join us for a demo to see how Smart Insights works, and how it transforms your CRM from a system of record into a true competitive advantage.

title: Solving the Marketing Mystery: AI-Powered Brand Partnerships
abstract: Modern marketing feels like an unsolvable mystery—customers are harder to reach, creative fatigue is real, and standing out requires detective-level investigation. But what if the clues were hiding in plain sight? Join CBS CMO Mike Benson, Mutual Markets CEO Alan Gould, and actor Morris Chestnut (Dr. Watson on CBS's "Watson") as they reveal how an innovative spirit and AI can help transform brand partnerships across every industry. Whether partnering with entertainment properties, influencers, or other brands, AI eliminates guesswork from partnership selection and marketing direction.

title: Meetup: Small (But Mighty) Marketing Teams
abstract:
Back by popular demand, this meetup is for marketers on teams of five or fewer. If you’ve ever worn five hats before lunch, this is your crowd. Expect real talk, laughs, and open convos about what’s working, what’s not, and how we’re all figuring it out. No panels, no pitches—just community, scrappy brilliance, and fresh ideas from small-but-mighty teams. Bring your wins, your struggles, and your best tips.

*Session reservations required this year.
