This session can change your life.

title: The Augmented Creator: Mastering Answer Engine Optimization
abstract: Learn Answer Engine Optimization as AI transforms search. Master "centaur content strategies" blending human creativity with AI capabilities. Audit content for AI gaps, structure info for AI answers, and build workflows maximizing both human connection and AI visibility.

title: Conversational Enrichment: The Self Generating CRM
abstract: Discover how Conversational Enrichment uses AI to understand every customer email, call, and document, auto-capturing contacts, intent, and key facts while you work. Leave manual data entry behind and arm sales, support, and RevOps teams with accurate coverage and instant next-step insights.

title: Unlocking ROI: Where Marketing and Finance Align
abstract: Three-quarters of marketing leaders feel increased pressure from CFOs to prove marketing's value, yet only a small percentage feel confident driving strategic decisions. Great marketing nurtures lasting, profitable relationships and integrates seamlessly with enterprise functions. Learn how integrated marketing planning eliminates operational silos, connects marketing teams with creative, leadership and finance, and transforms performance measurement to unlock ROI and increase influence.

title: ENCORE: The Secret to SuperHuman-Centric Marketing That Converts
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Most marketing today? Robotic, disconnected, forgettable. You’re checking all the boxes—SEO, content, metrics—but where are the conversions, loyalty, and real human connection?  Here’s the truth: Humans don’t buy from brands. They buy from other Humans. Without authenticity, empathy, and purpose, you’re leaving relationships and revenue on the table. In this no-BS, high-energy session, I’m unveiling the SuperHuman Marketing Framework—a blueprint for marketing that feels good, builds trust, and converts like crazy.

title: How to Write Better Messaging for Your AI Product
abstract: Right now, every software company is trying to market their AI as something innovative and different. But most companies are putting out messaging that either sounds like everyone else, or confuses buyers who are wary of all the AI-hype. This talk will give you a practical framework for how to write messaging that highlights the unique value of your AI product. You’ll  learn how to: hit the right altitude of messaging based on your buyer’s understanding of AI; use concrete language to help people quickly grasp why your AI matters; and differentiate your product in a rapidly evolving space.

title: ENCORE: Lab: HubSpot Workflow Automation With AI
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! In this lab, you'll learn how to develop intelligent workflows to automate customer engagement based on behavioral triggers. This lab is ideal for those seeking to streamline marketing, sales, and service processes through AI-enhanced automation. You'll discover how customer actions can initiate personalized and efficient automated responses, resulting in improved customer experiences and greater productivity.

title: CoLab 11: The Scale Delusion: Is Personal Touch Dead?
abstract: For years, Customer Success, Community, and Customer Support relied on personal touch. But with budgets decreasing and expectations increasing, scale is the word on everyone's lips. How do connection-focused industries thrive in a world focused on digitalization? Join fellow leaders for deep discussion on where customer-focused roles are heading in the age of AI. From existential to tactical, we'll explore shifting trends and leave you with tactics, philosophies, and a reminder that you're not alone. This session is a repeat offering of CoLab 1 (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

title: Tech That Builds Superfans: NBA and Travel Brand Playbook
abstract: Ever wanted VIP access to see how top brands use tech to deepen customer loyalty? Hear from the San Antonio Spurs and Xanterra Travel Collection as they share how they overcame data and tech challenges to transform fan and customer engagement. Learn how they turned obstacles into opportunities—using modern platforms to convert prospects into lifelong advocates and elevate the customer experience.

title: Smart Signals, Real Replies With HubSpot’s Prospecting Agent
abstract: Your prospects receive over 1,000+ cold emails yearly. Almost all go unanswered. See how HubSpot's Prospecting Agent changes the game by adapting like your best rep on their best day. Learn how it uses funding rounds, pricing page visits, form fills, and email opens to craft deeply personalized outreach that actually gets responses. You'll see the agent research companies, intelligently adapt follow-ups based on intent signals, and write in your voice - all while your team reaches new prospects and covers more territory in less time. Turn cold outreach into meetings booked today.

title: Spark Studio Session 7
abstract: Head towards the Impact Theater just passed The Spot and Fathom, and you'll find Spark Studio. Every great brand starts with a spark — and in Spark Studio, you'll bring one to life. Over 45 minutes, you and your team become a founding crew launching a brand from scratch. You'll dream big, craft winning pitches, navigate surprise challenges, and pivot under pressure before reflecting on the journey. This is a fully immersive, high-energy simulation where you won't just watch, you'll do. Expect fast-paced collaboration, creative problem-solving, and shared momentum that comes from building together under the clock. Seats limited, reserve now. What will you pitch?

title: What's New for Service With HubSpot
abstract: Service teams today need to handle more than ever, and still find time to build relationships that drive long-term loyalty. Join us to learn how HubSpot’s latest service tools can help your team scale support, discover key trends, and deliver customer experiences that drive retention.

title: 8ish GTM AI Agent Hacks My 8yo Kid Accidentally Figured Out
abstract: Kids instinctively find the smartest, easiest way to win. What if AI Agents could give your GTM team the same edge? In this session, you’ll learn 8ish practical AI Agent use cases that will make your GTM strategy smarter, faster, more intuitive, and more effective. You’ll also learn how to cut through the fuzziness of how AI Agents actually work—so you can move beyond hype to real implementation. While others spend time debating AI, you’ll leave with real-world applications that give you a competitive advantage. The question is: will you be the first to implement them?

title: ENCORE: What Comes After Content Marketing
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Content was King, then A.I. became God. Where does the human element fit in between? Google and OpenAI are shaking up the marketing landscape, and we need to become culture builders, not just content creators. When it comes to seeking, understanding, and engaging with communities, there are few tools as effective as Reddit. Hear from two of the architects of modern-day Reddit on how and why community marketing and culture building matters more than ever for your business strategy today.

title: ENCORE: Lab: HubSpot Email Marketing Toolkit for the AI Era
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Discover how to leverage HubSpot's comprehensive email marketing tools to create campaigns that truly connect with your audience. In this interactive Lab, you'll learn how AI can help craft compelling copy, practical ways to improve deliverability, and smart approaches to measuring what works. You'll leave with actionable strategies to immediately enhance your email performance and measure its impact on your marketing goals.

title: 40-Min AI Sprint: Branded AI Training and Take-Home Playbook
abstract: If AI isn’t driving results, we’ll fix it in 40 minutes. Get hands-on with the 5F Framework to train AI on your brand for 2-3X better results. This session distills the best of HubSpot’s AI Accelerator HUG into an actionable workshop—plus, you’ll take home an AI playbook to see results by Monday. Why this matters: AI is only as good as the context you give it. To drive real impact, it must speak your brand’s language, understand your ICP, and generate insights that move the needle. After this session, you’ll turn AI into a true extension of your team—without wasting hours on trial and error.

title: Tools for Growth: AI Sales Roleplays for Sales Enablement
abstract:
What if your enablement engine didn’t just train reps—but diagnosed exactly what was broken, tested interventions, proved what worked, and deployed it across your org? In this session, we’ll break down how Hyperbound helps sales teams move beyond static training to a real-time, evidence-based coaching loop.

By scoring real calls, identifying skill gaps, and assigning targeted AI roleplays, teams build a data-driven model of “what good looks like”—and continuously refine it. This is the scientific method, applied to sales performance at scale.

title: Tools for Growth: What 8K HubSpot Customers Automate With AI
abstract: Forget AI theory. See what 8,000+ HubSpot customers actually automate with Make. This fast-paced demo reveals the results of their most impactful workflows, with a sneak preview under the hood of how they're built. A must-see for marketing and ops teams who want proven solutions that work.

title: Spark Studio Session 9
abstract: Head towards the Impact Theater just passed The Spot and Fathom, and you'll find Spark Studio. Every great brand starts with a spark — and in Spark Studio, you'll bring one to life. Over 45 minutes, you and your team become a founding crew launching a brand from scratch. You'll dream big, craft winning pitches, navigate surprise challenges, and pivot under pressure before reflecting on the journey. This is a fully immersive, high-energy simulation where you won't just watch, you'll do. Expect fast-paced collaboration, creative problem-solving, and shared momentum that comes from building together under the clock. Seats limited, reserve now. What will you pitch?

title: Drive CRM Adoption With Gamification and Behavioral Science
abstract: Discover how gamification and behavioral science principles can unlock CRM adoption within HubSpot. Learn from real customer stories and get practical examples. Ideal for RevOps, CRM managers, and customer success leaders.

title: ENCORE: Revenue Modeling 101: Plan, Predict and Scale for 2026
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! You'll build a revenue model that actually works—one that aligns marketing and sales with company goals so you can plan your next moves with confidence. You’ll walk away with a revenue model template you can use immediately, whether you’re refining your go-to-market strategy or just trying to make sense of the numbers. No fluff, no guesswork—just a proven framework to help you hit (and exceed) your revenue goals.

title: Customer Value Revolution: 5 Shifts for CS Breakthrough
abstract: Customer Success has been playing defense for too long. Despite having talented people who genuinely want to help, CS teams have been buried in admin work, chasing the wrong metrics, and lacking the tools to prove their impact. That's finally changing. Join HubSpot's chief customer success officer as he reveals why this is CS's breakthrough moment. Learn the Customer Value Revolution framework — five shifts that let you measure real outcomes (not just usage), leverage AI to scale personalized value, and finally align CS with product. See how HubSpot transformed retention into growth.

title: Winning at Both Growth and Trust in the AI Age
abstract:
As your business grows, so does your data—and so do the risks and responsibilities tied to it. From scattered spreadsheets and email threads to CRM notes and support tickets, customer data often lives in unstructured and unmanaged places. Without the right strategy, businesses risk missing out on valuable insights—or worse, running into privacy and compliance pitfalls.
Join a conversation with HubSpot’s product and legal experts to learn how to transform your approach to unstructured data, data governance, privacy, and security to drive innovation and growth.

title: Fear(less) Mindset
Know Your Buyer: Selling to the Person Behind the Persona
The Devil is in the Details
The Future of Sales is a Story About Iron Man, not The Terminator
American Ninja Warrior, Award-Winning Leader, Entertainer
Account-Based RevOps: Rebuilding Your Revenue Engine in 2026
abstract: RevOps has long focused on generating net new leads, but for companies with complex sales cycles, the biggest growth opportunity already exists within current accounts. This session introduces Account-Based RevOps, a model that shifts focus to retention, expansion, and lifecycle revenue. You'll learn how to redesign scorecards around account health, align marketing, sales, and customer success around shared goals, and use AI to surface expansion opportunities earlier and more effectively across your revenue engine.

title: Build Your Loop Foundation: ICPs and Segmentation
abstract: Use HubSpot's Breeze Assistant to audit and structure your CRM data. Then, leverage those insights to build a detailed Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) and generate compelling campaign concepts rooted in real customer behavior. From there, segment and enrich your audience into actionable groups. This is the strategic groundwork that transforms generic marketing into precision-targeted, scalable growth.

title: What Neuroscience Reveals About Sales Success
abstract: As AI becomes more common in sales, teams need a clearer understanding of when human connection matters most and where AI can add value. This session explores that question through the lens of neuroscience, examining how buyers respond differently to human sellers and AI agents. You'll learn what each approach does well, where each falls short, and how to design sales experiences that combine the strengths of both to improve buyer experience and performance.

title: The Hidden Cost of Cognitive Bias in Sales Hiring
abstract: Sales hiring failures are often expensive, disruptive, and more common than many leaders realize. This session explores how cognitive bias affects hiring decisions and what teams can do to improve their odds of selecting the right candidates. You'll learn how to identify the biases that distort judgment, refine your seller profile and job materials, and use structured interview scorecards to make stronger, more data-informed hiring decisions that support long-term sales performance.

title: Audit Your HubSpot Live: Find High-Impact Wins
abstract: In this hands-on session, you’ll audit your own HubSpot portal to uncover high-impact opportunities across data, automation, and setup. Guided by proven frameworks used across hundreds of portals, you’ll identify areas for improvement and build a clear, prioritized action plan. This working session ensures you leave with practical next steps you can implement immediately to drive better performance.

title: The AI Handoff: When Should AI Stop and Humans Step In?
abstract: Most teams design AI to contain conversations, but customers want an easy path to a human. While AI adoption is accelerating, 64% of customers still prefer not to engage with it in service scenarios, largely due to fear of being stuck. This session introduces a decision framework for when AI should continue versus when a human should step in, and how to design seamless transitions that maintain trust, reduce friction, and improve the overall customer experience.

title: Winning AI Search: Close the Gaps That Cost You Customers
abstract: AI-driven search is reshaping how buyers find and evaluate solutions, often before they ever visit your site. In this session, you’ll learn how to identify the gaps preventing your content from being surfaced and trusted. Explore how relevance, authority, and credibility influence visibility, and walk away with practical steps to improve how your brand shows up in modern search experiences.

title: Breeze Assistant: The New Way Growth Teams Work
abstract: Many teams struggle to move beyond isolated experiments into scalable ways of working. In this session, see how Breeze Assistant is being used to streamline workflows, improve productivity, and support day-to-day execution inside HubSpot. Through real examples and live demonstrations, you’ll learn how teams are consolidating tools and building a more efficient, unified way of working across their go-to-market motion.

title: The 0 to $100M ARR Playbook: Gamma’s Growth Journey
abstract: Scaling to nine figures in ARR and 100M users with a lean team requires a different growth model than most companies expect. In this session, Grant Lee shares the unconventional strategies behind Gamma’s rise, including how the company used creators, brand investment, and product feedback loops to double its user base in less than a year with minimal paid marketing. You'll learn practical lessons on habit formation, founder-led storytelling, and the growth levers that helped Gamma scale quickly while staying focused and resource efficient.

title: From Rep to Revenue Leader: The Confidence Gap
abstract: Many top sales reps struggle when stepping into leadership roles because the skills that drive individual success do not translate directly to managing teams and owning outcomes. This session explores the confidence gap that often follows this transition and provides a practical framework for addressing it. You'll learn how to identify the root causes of self-doubt, build leadership capability intentionally, and develop a clear plan to grow into a confident and effective revenue leader.

title: Optimize Customer Agent: Channels, Actions, Performance
abstract: You've deployed customer agent to at least one channel. Now it's time to optimize. In this Academy Lab, you'll work through channel expansion, working hours, handoff logic, performance reports, and structured knowledge to ensure your customer agent delivers value to more customers. This session is designed for Service Hub Professional or Enterprise customers with customer agent already live. You should have editor permissions and be familiar with basic setup and configuration.

title: Predict Churn Before It Happens Without Health Scores
abstract: Traditional health scores often fail to reflect the realities of modern Customer Success, leading teams to miss churn risk and waste time on misleading signals. This session introduces Renewal Probability Scoring as a more useful model for forecasting account outcomes across the customer journey. You'll learn how to replace outdated health metrics, incorporate customer sentiment more effectively, and turn static signals like NPS into more predictive indicators that support better retention planning and decision making.

title: Launch Your First Customer Agent for High-Volume Support
abstract: Learn how to set up and activate Breeze Customer Agent to handle common support questions—no code required. Train it using existing knowledge base articles, website content and more, test responses with prebuilt questions, and configure smart handoffs for complex issues. By the end of this lab, you’ll leave with a production-ready agent resolving routine inquiries 24/7.

title: The Death of the Natural Closer in Sales
abstract: For years, sales success has been attributed to charisma and instinct, but data tells a different story. In this session, research conducted with Jasper Engines and Transmissions and NYU reveals that reps who follow structured, repeatable processes significantly outperform their peers. By linking activity data to revenue outcomes, this session highlights the KPIs, coaching strategies, and systems leaders can use to build disciplined execution and drive more predictable, scalable growth.

title: Fix CRM Adoption: A Blueprint for Complex Sales Teams
abstract: CRM adoption fails when systems do not match how teams actually work. In this session, you'll learn how to design a sales system that drives consistent usage across complex teams. Explore how to define pipeline stages clearly, align workflows to real selling behavior, and use automation to capture accurate data without extra effort. You'll also learn how to create role-based views that help reps, managers, and leaders act quickly and confidently.

title: How We Increased NRR by 47 Points
abstract: Driving expansion often comes down to identifying the right signals and acting on them effectively. In this session, you’ll learn how one team used a structured data framework to surface high-potential accounts and significantly improve net revenue retention. Explore how to prioritize signals, uncover hidden opportunities, and build a repeatable approach to growth that scales even with limited resources.

title: Rank Your Marketing Experiments Like a Growth Team
abstract: Even with better tools and AI-enabled workflows, marketing teams still need to decide which experiments deserve time and resources. This session introduces the ICE-T Framework, a simple way to estimate impact before launching a test. You'll learn how to calculate incremental conversions, prioritize experiments systematically, and explain your roadmap using the language of revenue and business value. Walk away with a practical method for building a stronger, more defensible experimentation strategy.

title: What 10,000 Hours of AEO Taught Us
abstract: After extensive work across Answer Engine Optimization campaigns, this session distills what actually improves brand visibility in AI-powered search and what does not. You'll learn the frameworks, failures, and practical lessons that emerged from tracking performance across major answer engines. The session will cover how company context, author voice, audience personas, and research workflows shape AI visibility, along with how to build a process that scales credibility and discoverability rather than just content volume.

title: Marketing's Secret Weapon: CX Signals That Drive Revenue
abstract: Every customer interaction generates signals that can reveal intent, friction, and opportunity, but most marketing teams never use them. This session explores how combining customer experience signals with CRM data helps marketers uncover deeper insights and act with greater precision. You'll learn how AI can surface hidden patterns, improve segmentation, personalize engagement at scale, and power lifecycle campaigns that drive retention, expansion, and measurable revenue growth.

title: Do This, Not That: Fastest Lifts in Content, Offers, & AI
abstract: Most marketing underperforms because it is slow, overly complex, and built on outdated assumptions. This fast-paced session delivers practical, high-impact tactics that can be implemented in minutes across email, social, landing pages, and AI workflows. You'll learn how to improve engagement with simple CTA changes, optimize timing to capture attention, and structure content in ways platforms reward today. Walk away with actionable ideas that drive immediate performance gains without additional budget or resources.

title: Your Pricing Model Is a Customer Experience—Make It a Good One
abstract: Pricing is more than a financial decision, it shapes how customers experience your product. In this session, you’ll learn how to design pricing models that reflect customer value and support long-term growth. Explore real examples of what works and what doesn’t, and walk away with a practical framework for aligning pricing strategy with customer expectations.

title: AI Can’t Create Trust. But It Can Scale It.
abstract: AI is making marketing faster, cheaper, and louder. It’s not making it more believable. Budgets are flat at 7.7% of revenue and 88% of people still trust recommendations from people they know over any other form of marketing.Most teams just aren't using it. Marketing leaders from Workday and Atlassian join InGo CEO Michael Barnett to share how they use AI to activate human trust at scale. Real results: at Workday Rising, an AI-powered campaign drove 11,800+ quiz completions, 12,300+ clicks, and 8x more social buzz with zero paid media. All peer-driven. All measurable. No influencer campaigns. Real peer-to-peer activation. AI didn’t create the trust. People did. AI made it repeatable.

title: From AI Experiments to Automation That Converts
abstract: Most teams are experimenting with AI, but few are building programs that consistently drive results. In this session, you'll see how HubSpot's email team designs AI-powered automation that doubled baseline conversion rates with nearly 100% of emails personalized at scale. Learn the architecture behind scalable 1:1 personalization, how to choose the right data inputs, how to design prompts that write emails without human review, and a repeatable QA framework to protect brand voice and catch errors. You'll leave with a blueprint you can implement immediately, no engineering team required.

title: Designing an AI Powered Customer Journey in HubSpot
abstract: Customer Success teams are under pressure to improve retention and expansion without increasing headcount. This session walks through how to design an AI-powered post-sale journey inside HubSpot, using Service Hub, workflows, health signals, and AI agents. Learn how to automate onboarding and routine tasks, identify risk earlier, scale lower-revenue segments, and create a system that supports upsell and expansion. You'll leave with a clear framework for turning Customer Success into a scalable growth engine.

title: Get Your Data AI-Ready: Configure a CRM That AI Can Use
abstract: Manual data entry creates errors, slows teams down, and turns CRM cleanup into a full-time job. But with a repeatable system, AI-ready data becomes something you can trust and use. The goal isn't AI for AI's sake. It's building a scalable process that helps teams make better decisions, faster. In this deep dive for admins and RevOps professionals, HubSpot product managers share impactful ways to use Smart CRM's data quality tools and customize settings so records stay accurate. You'll also see how Breeze Assistant can streamline operations as an expert coworker.

title: How AEO Has Changed the Marketing Playbook
abstract: AI is reshaping how buyers discover and engage with content, requiring marketers to rethink traditional playbooks. This session explores how Answer Engine Optimization is changing demand generation and what strategies are working today. You'll learn how AI surfaces content, how to balance AEO with existing marketing approaches, and how to adapt your strategy to stay visible and competitive in an evolving landscape.

title: Running Loops: A Marketer's Guide to AI-Era Growth
abstract: Marketing has changed dramatically as buyers increasingly discover brands through AI-generated answers instead of traditional search. This session introduces Loop Marketing, a growth approach designed for this new environment, where humans and AI work together to shape, adapt, distribute, and improve messaging in real time. You'll learn how to apply the Loop Marketing framework inside HubSpot and leave with a practical understanding of how to launch your first campaign using this model.

title: Turn HubSpot Into a System of Record Across Your Stack
abstract: Disconnected systems limit the value your data can deliver. In this session, you’ll learn how connected apps and integrations extend HubSpot’s capabilities and create a more unified system. Explore how to bring insights into your workflows, improve data consistency, and build a scalable ecosystem that supports better decision-making. You’ll leave with a framework for evaluating and managing your integrations effectively.

title: The Belonging Economy: Marketing’s New Competitive Advantage
abstract: Attention isn't scarce - trust is. Leaders who get that are building the most durable growth engines. Welcome to the Belonging Economy, where audiences expect more than content and customers more than transactions. Brands winning now aren't acquiring users - they're building ecosystems where people stay, refer, and invest. Sheena Collier, Founder and CEO of Boston While Black, has engaged 100K+ people via live and digital experiences, driving multi-six-figure sponsorship revenue. She shares a framework to activate audiences, turn followers into customers, and belonging into recurring revenue.

title: 3 Costly Mistakes Marketers Make with Today’s Humans
abstract: Today’s buyers are more informed and digitally enabled than ever, but they don’t behave the way many marketers assume. In this session, you’ll uncover three common mistakes that weaken modern marketing performance and learn what behavioral science reveals instead. With practical examples and clear takeaways, you’ll walk away with messaging strategies that better align with how people actually make decisions.

title: Inside Commerce Hub With GM Sarika Garg
abstract: Growing companies often manage deals, billing, and payments across disconnected systems, creating inefficiency and limiting visibility. This session introduces HubSpot’s Revenue Operating System, which unifies the full revenue lifecycle inside the CRM. See how to move from quote to cash in a connected system, align teams across sales, finance, and operations, and simplify revenue processes. You'll leave with a clear understanding of how to implement RevOS and drive faster, more predictable revenue.

title: Diagnose Team Tension Before It Derails Results
abstract: Marketing leaders face constant tension across teams, priorities, and expectations, but many problems become harder when the wrong type of tension is being addressed. This workshop introduces the Four Tensions of Leadership and shows how to diagnose what kind of challenge you are actually facing before choosing a response. You'll learn practical frameworks for handling feedback, coaching, stakeholder negotiation, and change so you can lead more effectively without damaging trust or momentum.

title: Why Your Brand Isn’t Showing up and How To Win Back Demand
abstract: Buyers are discovering brands in new ways, often before they ever reach your website. In this session, you’ll learn how to design a modern awareness strategy that reflects how discovery actually happens today. Explore how to define your narrative, activate it across emerging channels, and measure what’s truly driving demand. You’ll leave with a clearer approach to rebuilding visibility and capturing lost opportunities.

title: Translating Ideas into Buildable Systems
abstract: Great marketing ideas often stall at the point of execution. The challenge is not vision, it is clearly translating what needs to be built for AI tools, engineers, or data teams. As AI accelerates technical execution, clarity becomes the real bottleneck. This session gives marketers, RevOps professionals, and HubSpot admins a practical framework for turning ideas into structured, buildable requests, with real examples, templates, and formats you can start using immediately.

title: OpenPhone to Quo: How to Rebrand 7 Years In
abstract: Rebranding is difficult under any circumstances, but it becomes far more complex when thousands of customers already know and trust your name. This session shares lessons from a large-scale rebrand, including how the team protected pipeline, maintained customer trust, aligned employees, and managed technical migration risks. You'll learn practical strategies for planning a rebrand, executing it without disrupting growth, and measuring success in ways that go beyond awareness or other vanity metrics.

title: Reinventing Marketing Engine for the AI-Driven Buyer
abstract: Marketing is being reshaped by how buyers discover and evaluate solutions. In this session, Angela DeFranco shares how teams can adapt their strategy to stay visible and effective in this new environment. You’ll see how to identify where your brand shows up, adjust campaigns quickly, and connect performance to real outcomes. Through examples and practical frameworks, you’ll learn how to build a more resilient, insight-driven approach to growth.

title: Infinite Customization With the Developer Platform
abstract: Your business isn't one-size-fits-all, so why should your software be? Through live demos and real-world examples, discover how developers are building highly customizable HubSpot experiences. See how apps and developer tools let you tailor UI, workflows, data models, and agent behaviors to match your exact processes. Watch developers extend Breeze Agents with MCP servers, build with AI coding assistants, and prototype solutions in minutes. Plus, explore platform capabilities like API versioning, serverless functions, and UI extensions available today and coming next.

title: What’s New for Sellers
abstract: This session highlights the latest HubSpot updates designed to help sellers spend less time on busywork and more time moving deals forward. You'll get a practical look at what is new, why these features matter, and how to start using them effectively in your sales process. The session will also provide context on where HubSpot is headed next so teams can understand how these updates support stronger revenue performance.

title: The Decision Engine: How to Build a CRM That Drives Action
abstract: Most CRMs are designed to manage processes, not to guide decisions. This interactive workshop introduces the D3 Framework, Discover, Decode, Decide, to transform HubSpot into a true decision engine. Through hands on exercises and real world scenarios, you'll learn how to connect data to strategic questions, forecast outcomes, and translate insights into action, leaving with a blueprint to align your CRM with executive priorities and drive smarter go to market decisions.

title: Build Trust Through Storytelling in a Skeptical World
abstract: Trust has become harder to earn as content becomes easier to produce. In this session, you’ll learn how to craft authentic messaging that builds credibility and connection. Maha shares her proven approach to turning ideas into powerful narratives that resonate with audiences and leaders alike. You’ll walk away with practical techniques to strengthen your communication, improve clarity, and build trust in a rapidly evolving landscape.

title: Redesigning Your Revenue Engine for Scale
abstract: Revenue teams are under pressure to grow without adding headcount. In this session, you'll learn how Canibuild reimagined its entire go to market strategy using AI, identifying where automation could replace manual work while maintaining customer experience. From reducing speed to lead to under one minute to improving conversion rates and support resolution, this session shares a practical framework for prioritizing and implementing AI across the full revenue lifecycle.

title: HubSpot’s Playbook for Scaling Video Across the Org
abstract: Video is becoming a core communication channel across organizations, but scaling production can be difficult. This session explores how teams can build a video-first strategy by enabling non-specialists to create high-quality content. Learn the processes, tools, and organizational changes required to scale video production, improve consistency, and integrate video into everyday workflows across marketing, sales, and service.

title: The Breeze Playbook: Use Cases That Drive Real Results
abstract: Breeze is more than a single AI feature; it is a connected system embedded across the HubSpot platform. In this session, you'll explore high impact use cases across marketing, sales, and service, from automating support to improving prospecting and streamlining workflows. Through real customer examples and guided walkthroughs, you'll learn how to identify, prioritize, and implement the right AI use cases for your team, leaving with a clear action plan you can apply immediately.

title: What's New in Sales Hub
abstract: This session highlights the latest innovations in Sales Hub and how they help teams sell more efficiently and effectively. You'll hear directly from HubSpot leadership about new capabilities, product direction, and the opportunities these updates create for sales teams. Walk away with a clearer understanding of what is new, what matters most, and how to apply the latest improvements in your own sales motion.

title: From Marketing Executor to Marketing Architect
abstract: As AI transforms marketing execution, the most valuable role is shifting from doing campaigns to designing systems. This session shows how to move from execution to architecture by applying marketing operations principles across process, data, and technology. Learn how to build systems that scale, gain strategic influence, and position yourself as a key driver of growth. Walk away with a clear roadmap to evolve your role and increase your impact in an AI-driven environment.

title: Marketer's Modern Data Stack: How We Built PLG Automation
abstract: Product-led growth depends on connecting product usage data, customer context, and marketing automation in real time, but many teams lack the infrastructure to do it well. This session breaks down how one team built a modern marketing data stack without a dedicated data team, using Databricks, reverse ETL, and HubSpot to power PLG automation. You'll learn how to connect telemetry to action, trigger campaigns from key product signals, and make governance decisions that support scale.

title: Optimization: Things Every HubSpot Admin Needs to Know
abstract: HubSpot admins often inherit systems that need improvement as teams grow and processes become more complex. This session focuses on how to optimize an existing HubSpot setup so it works better across reporting, automation, and object management. You'll learn practical ways to improve core hubs, evaluate which additional tools are worth adopting, and strengthen the system so it can support the next stage of growth more effectively.

title: RevOps for Real: Systems Built for Imperfection
abstract: Most RevOps frameworks assume ideal conditions, but real organizations are messy, inconsistent, and constantly changing. This session explores how to build systems that work in that reality instead of fighting against it. Through examples of both failure and success, you'll learn how to diagnose what is truly broken, decide what should be automated, and apply a Minimum Viable RevOps model that supports revenue without overengineering the process.

title: Email List Decay: The Silent Growth Killer
abstract: Email is one of the highest ROI channels, but performance often declines long before teams understand why. This session explores how email list decay reduces deliverability, lowers engagement, and weakens sender reputation over time. You'll learn how to identify early warning signs, balance list growth with long-term health, and build repeatable processes to maintain performance. Walk away with a clear approach to protecting and improving one of your most valuable growth channels.

title: How Data Agent Fuels Your Growth Engine With Context and Signals
abstract: Buyer intent, data enrichment, and AI agents all serve one purpose, giving your team the right information at the right time. This session breaks down how these capabilities work together inside HubSpot to improve targeting, prioritization, and execution. You'll learn how intent signals identify in-market accounts, how enrichment keeps records accurate, and how Data Agent automates research across workflows to provide deeper context, helping teams act faster and make better decisions.

title: The Next 5 Years Will Not Reward the Smartest People
abstract: As AI makes knowledge more accessible and ideas easier to generate, the real advantage is shifting from intelligence alone to execution, visibility, and consistency. This session explores why speed, accountability, and action will matter more than polish in the years ahead. You'll learn how to build momentum, increase your visibility, expand your network without waiting for permission, and overcome hesitation so you can create more opportunity and impact in a rapidly changing environment.

title: The Rise of the In-Person GTM Engine
abstract: As automation makes digital channels noisier, in-person interactions are becoming some of the highest-intent moments in the funnel. This session introduces the In-Person GTM Engine, a system for turning real-world conversations into structured CRM data, fast follow-up, and measurable pipeline. You'll learn how to capture context more effectively, operationalize event and networking interactions, and build workflows that help teams turn presence into real revenue momentum.

title: What 1M+ Responses Reveal About Showing Up in Answer Engines
abstract: AI search is changing how buyers discover and evaluate brands, and understanding visibility in answer engines now requires a different playbook. This session shares lessons from analyzing more than a million AI responses across major platforms to show what influences citation and visibility. You'll learn which content formats perform best, how freshness and structure affect outcomes, and why success in AEO should be measured over time rather than through one-off snapshots.

title: How to Stop AI Agents from Making Stuff Up
abstract: AI agents often generate incorrect information because they are designed to be helpful, not because they are flawed. In this session, you'll learn how to prevent hallucinations in real workflows by setting clear rules, limiting data sources, and implementing validation checks. Discover how to design prompts and systems that reduce ambiguity, enforce accuracy, and ensure outputs can be trusted before they are used in customer-facing or internal processes.

title: A Repeatable LinkedIn Content System That Actually Drives Pipeline
abstract: Building consistent, high-performing LinkedIn content is one of the biggest challenges for teams today. In this session, you’ll get a full year of proven content ideas, formats, and frameworks you can apply across personal and company profiles. Learn how to create engaging content that drives real interaction and conversion, while scaling output without losing authenticity. You’ll leave with practical templates and a clear plan to execute immediately.

title: Admins Unfiltered: From Workaround to Breakthrough
abstract: Real stories from HubSpot admins who used AI to solve the hard stuff and level up their impact.The most innovative admins are using AI to solve problems creatively, lift the operational weight off their teams, and step into the kind of strategic work that actually moves the business. In this session, three HubSpot admins share their unfiltered stories: what they built, how AI helped them get there, and what opened up for them once the hard work paid off.

title: How Multi-Brand Companies Scale with HubSpot's MaM
abstract: Managing multiple brands or regions within a single system can quickly become complex. This session explores how organizations use HubSpot Multi-Account Management to scale while maintaining clarity and control. You'll learn how to structure accounts, enable collaboration across teams, and preserve visibility without sacrificing autonomy, supported by real use cases and practical examples.

title: How I Turned a CEO Into a Thought Leader
abstract: Getting executive buy-in for content can be one of the biggest challenges for marketing teams. In this session, you'll learn how to turn a CEO into a consistent thought leader who drives pipeline. Through a candid conversation, the speakers share how to build trust, create repeatable content systems using AI, and align on the value of brand investment even when it is difficult to measure directly.

title: Troubleshooting: Things Every HubSpot Admin Needs to Know
abstract: HubSpot admins are often the first people called when systems break, data changes unexpectedly, or workflows stop behaving as planned. This session focuses on practical troubleshooting skills that help admins identify issues faster and resolve them with confidence. You'll learn how to trace changes to CRM data, troubleshoot workflows and reports, and handle more advanced challenges that arise in larger or more complex HubSpot environments.

title: The Fandom Playbook: Create Passionate Fans to Grow Business
abstract: In a crowded and increasingly noisy market, real growth comes from building devoted supporters, not just accumulating customers or followers. This session explores how organizations can create authentic human connection and turn that connection into fandom that drives loyalty, advocacy, and long-term growth. You'll learn practical ways to inspire stronger emotional investment, build community around your brand, and create the kind of trust and enthusiasm that fuels sustainable momentum.

title: Implementation: Things Every HubSpot Admin Needs to Know
abstract: HubSpot admins play a critical role in implementing and maintaining systems that support business growth. This session provides practical guidance for setting up HubSpot effectively, whether you are new to the platform or supporting others as a partner or consultant. You'll learn how to configure core hubs, prioritize key features, and build a strong foundation that supports long-term success and scalability.

title: The B2B Credibility Code
abstract: In today’s decentralized, creator-driven economy, trust is no longer built solely by brands; it is earned through visible expertise and credible voices. This session explores how B2B organizations can intentionally design credibility into their marketing by combining professional creators, platform signals, and video. You'll gain clear, evidence-based guidance on balancing corporate brand authority with individual influence to accelerate trust, strengthen buyer confidence, and drive more effective growth.

title: What’s New for Marketers
abstract: This session highlights the latest HubSpot updates designed to help marketers build awareness, create stronger content, and turn campaigns into measurable results. You'll get a clear overview of what is new, why it matters, and how to start using the latest features effectively. You'll also hear how these updates fit into HubSpot's broader direction so you can better understand what is coming next for modern marketing teams.

title: The Loop Unplugged: Inside Modern B2B Growth
abstract: The Loop promises continuous, compounding growth, but many teams struggle to apply it in day-to-day execution. In this live discussion, leaders from Blend and HubSpot unpack what it takes to operationalize Express, Tailor, Amplify, and Evolve across content, AI, distribution, and measurement. You'll hear real examples, practical lessons, and candid insights into how modern B2B teams are using The Loop to create more predictable pipeline and stronger alignment across growth efforts.

title: Feeling Known Beats Being Targeted
abstract: Personalization has become overly technical and often fails to make customers feel truly understood. Tokens and automation increase output but rarely create meaningful connection. This session explores how memory, timing, and context create experiences that feel human. Learn how to design interactions across onboarding, events, and renewals that go beyond targeting to build recognition and trust. Walk away with a new approach to creating experiences that make customers feel known, not just segmented.

title: Lead Management Mastery: From Chaos to Conversion in HubSpot
abstract: Lead management often breaks down when ownership is unclear, routing is weak, and teams cannot see where pipeline is leaking. This session shows how to rebuild that system inside HubSpot by designing stronger handoffs between marketing and sales, optimizing the sales workspace and lead object, and creating governance that surfaces stalled leads early. You'll leave with a practical framework for improving speed, accountability, and conversion across your lead management process.

title: Build Your Loop Marketing Campaign With AI
abstract: In this Academy Lab, you'll use Breeze to generate a campaign brief, develop a compelling hero offer, and remix AEO-optimized content across channels. Everything you create will be aligned to your brand voice and target audience. To close the loop, you'll build an AI-powered workflow that puts your campaign intelligence to work automatically. Leave with ready-to-publish deliverables, a clear execution roadmap, and a repeatable playbook you can scale immediately. Come prepared with a defined ICP, brand style guidelines, and a campaign concept.

title: Beyond Ticket Sales: How To Prove Event ROI
abstract: Events can be powerful growth drivers when they’re tied to measurable outcomes. In this session, you’ll learn how to connect event strategy to pipeline and revenue using a structured approach. Explore how to track performance from registration through post-event follow-up, align teams around shared metrics, and build reporting that demonstrates real impact. Walk away with a framework to make events a consistent, accountable revenue driver.

title: Connecting Support and Success to Drive Growth
abstract: Support and customer success are often treated as separate functions, but when unified, they can become powerful growth drivers. In this session, you’ll learn how to connect these teams to improve efficiency, surface expansion opportunities, and strengthen customer relationships. Explore how to turn everyday interactions into insights that drive retention, loyalty, and revenue growth.

title: How Smart CRM Powers the Agentic Customer Platform
abstract: AI is only as effective as the data behind it, and many teams are working with systems that are fragmented and unreliable. This session explores how unified data within HubSpot creates a strong foundation for AI, transforming CRM from a static database into a dynamic, self-improving system. You'll learn how Smart CRM capabilities improve data quality, support better decision-making, and enable more effective AI use cases, along with a practical plan to begin implementing this approach.

title: From Dashboards to Decisions: How to Build Revenue Reporting
abstract: Many revenue teams rely on dashboards that look complete but fail to drive decisions. This session breaks down common reporting mistakes and shows how to build systems that reflect real buyer behavior. Learn how to design accurate conversion metrics, choose the right reporting methods, and create dashboards that teams trust. Walk away with a practical framework for building reporting that supports forecasting, coaching, and confident decision making across your organization.

title: From Prompting to Building: Create Your First AI Agent
abstract: Most marketers are still using prompts, while leading teams are building AI agents that complete full workflows. In this hands-on session, you'll learn how to design and launch an AI agent that executes real marketing tasks from start to finish. Explore core concepts like architecture, memory, and orchestration, and learn how to structure brand and CRM data into reusable components. Walk away with a working blueprint you can apply immediately to automate and scale your go-to-market efforts.

title: Where AI Fails in GTM (And What Actually Drives Growth)
abstract: AI is everywhere in go-to-market, yet results aren’t improving. Why? AI doesn’t fix GTM. It scales whatever system you already have. If your strategy is misaligned or unclear, AI amplifies the noise. In this session, Sangram Vajre breaks down where teams get AI wrong and shares real use cases where it falls short. You’ll learn how to diagnose your GTM, fix alignment gaps, and apply AI in a way that improves engagement, conversion, and revenue.

title: Community Over Ads: Growing Without a Marketing Budget
abstract: Growth doesn’t always require large budgets, often it comes from strong relationships and engaged communities. In this session, you’ll learn how founders build referral engines, nurture networks, and turn customers into advocates. Explore practical tactics for generating demand through community-led strategies and maintaining momentum over time without relying on paid acquisition.

title: What’s New for Service
abstract: This session highlights the latest HubSpot updates for service teams and how they help organizations deliver stronger customer experiences while scaling support more effectively. You'll learn what is new, why these features matter, and how to start using them to improve team performance and customer outcomes. The session also offers a view into what is coming next so service leaders can better plan for the future.

title: Building a Data System That Powers Growth
abstract: As companies scale, data fragments across tools and teams, making it harder to act on what matters. In this session, you’ll learn a practical framework for structuring and activating your data across systems. Using HubSpot as a core example, we’ll explore how to unify signals, operationalize insights, and turn data into action through automation and prioritization. You’ll leave with a clearer approach to connecting your data strategy to real business outcomes.

title: Building the Data Foundation for Agentic AI
abstract: AI agents can only be as good as the data they run on. But for most teams, that data is scattered across tools, out of date, and disconnected from the platform where work actually happens. In this session, HubSpot GM Adam Cuzzort shows how growing companies are building the data foundation that makes agentic AI possible: connected, clean, and native to the CRM where every campaign, deal, and customer interaction lives. No middleware. No data team required. Just AI that finally has what it needs to work.

title: How Our AI BDR Increased More Human Conversations
abstract: Many AI BDR implementations focus on reducing costs, but this session takes a different approach by focusing on increasing team capacity. Learn how embedding an AI BDR into HubSpot workflows can automate qualification and follow-up while enabling human reps to focus on high-value conversations. You'll see the workflows, guardrails, and metrics used to improve speed, increase pipeline, and create more meaningful interactions.

title: Stop the Silent Traffic Drop: A Hands-On AEO Playbook
abstract: As AI answer engines reshape discovery, many teams are seeing organic traffic decline without a clear plan for how to respond. This hands-on session walks through how to use AEO to understand your brand visibility, assess competitors, and identify the actions that matter most. You'll learn how to interpret key dashboards, analyze citations and competitor patterns, and turn those insights into a practical 30-day execution plan connected to HubSpot's content tools.

title: 7 HubSpot Workflow Upgrades You Can Implement Today
abstract: Many teams rely on manual workarounds that slow down performance and create inefficiencies. In this session, you’ll explore practical workflow upgrades that extend what’s possible in HubSpot without adding unnecessary complexity. From routing and enrichment to data cleanup and automation, you’ll learn how to implement improvements quickly and effectively. Walk away with actionable examples you can apply immediately to improve efficiency and data quality.

title: Turning Unstructured Conversation Data into Revenue
abstract: Strong sales conversations often lose momentum when key details are forgotten, follow-up is delayed, or CRM updates happen too late. This session explores how unstructured conversation data can be turned into action inside HubSpot using Smart Deal Progression. You'll learn how transcripts, suggested next steps, drafted emails, and unified context help teams maintain momentum, reduce manual work, and move deals forward more consistently after every important conversation.

title: Turn AI Experiments Into Measurable Revenue
abstract: Many teams are experimenting with AI, but few are translating that activity into measurable results. This session provides a practical framework for moving from experimentation to impact. Learn how to align AI usage with performance metrics, identify gaps in adoption, and prevent inconsistent or risky use. You'll leave with a repeatable approach to scaling AI across marketing, sales, and RevOps while maintaining accountability, consistency, and measurable revenue outcomes.

title: Vibe by Design: Stop Blaming the Format
abstract: Event engagement problems are often blamed on format or platform, but the real issue is usually poor design. This session introduces the concept of an engagement arc—a structured emotional journey that can improve experiences across in-person, virtual, and hybrid events. You'll learn how to identify where your event design breaks down, replace low-impact tactics with stronger moments, and create a framework you can apply before, during, and after any event to drive better participation and connection.

title: From Signals To Scale: How We Increased NRR by 47 Points
abstract: Driving expansion isn't just about finding signals—it’s about codifying them into a repeatable engine. This session breaks down the Growth Filter Index (GFI), the framework behind a 47-point NRR increase, and shows you how to easily use AI to surface high-potential accounts and automate signal prioritization. Whether you’re a team of one or scaling an enterprise, you’ll walk away with a simple, AI-driven methodology to uncover hidden revenue and turn customer signals into a predictable growth engine.

title: The New Awareness Playbook: Show up Where Buyers Are
abstract: The way buyers discover brands has fundamentally shifted. Ten years ago, search was the starting line. Now buyers start on TikTok, ask ChatGPT, and check Reddit before your homepage ever loads. In this session, HubSpot's Director of Product Beeri Amiel breaks down what the shift from search-led to AI- and social-led discovery means for your awareness strategy — and shows you how to adapt: from identifying where your buyers actually spend time, to designing channel-specific content that resonates, to activating your story across TikTok, Reddit, and AI search from a single customer platform.

title: Turn Conversations Into Automated Revenue Workflows
abstract: Capturing insights from conversations is only valuable if it leads to action. In this session, you’ll learn how to connect conversation data with automation to drive consistent follow-through. Explore how to trigger next steps, maintain clean data, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks across teams. You’ll leave with practical frameworks to turn conversations into measurable outcomes and improve operational reliability.
